mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message(sender_id, receiver_id, content, is_read) VALUES(#{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{content}, #{isRead})
mapper.select: SELECT m.*, s.nickname AS sender_nickname, r.nickname AS receiver_nickname FROM message m LEFT JOIN sys_user s ON m.sender_id = s.id LEFT JOIN sys_user r ON m.receiver_id = r.id WHERE (m.sender_id = #{userId} AND m.receiver_id = #{peerId}) OR (m.sender_id = #{peerId} AND m.receiver_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY m.create_time ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message WHERE (sender_id = #{userId} AND receiver_id = #{peerId}) OR (sender_id = #{peerId} AND receiver_id = #{userId})

SELECT m.*, s.nickname AS sender_nickname, r.nickname AS receiver_nickname FROM message m LEFT JOIN sys_user s ON m.sender_id = s.id LEFT JOIN sys_user r ON m.receiver_id = r.id WHERE m.id IN ( SELECT MAX(id) FROM message WHERE sender_id = #{userId} OR receiver_id = #{userId} GROUP BY LEAST(sender_id, receiver_id), GREATEST(sender_id, receiver_id) ) ORDER BY m.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE message SET is_read = 1 WHERE sender_id = #{senderId} AND receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE message SET is_read = 1 WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
